creator: mbeis@xs4all.nl
text:
After the update of x11/qterminal to 0.9.0, patch patch-src_tabwidget.cpp fails to apply cleanly. I think the patch isn't needed anymore and can be removed. After removal qterminal builds, installs and runs fine.

[...]
===>  Patching for qterminal-0.9.0
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for qterminal-0.9.0
Ignoring previously applied (or reversed) patch.
1 out of 1 hunks ignored--saving rejects to src/tabwidget.cpp.rej
=> FreeBSD patch patch-src_tabwidget.cpp failed to apply cleanly.
=> Patch(es)  patch-src_config.h patch-src_forms_qterminal.ui applied cleanly.
*** Error code 1
[...]

My uname:
FreeBSD yokozuna 11.1-STABLE FreeBSD 11.1-STABLE #0 r328478: Sat Jan 27 22:31:28 CET 2018     root@yokozuna:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/YOKOZUNA  amd64


Regards,
Marco
